personality_one_liner: A crisp, professional, and hyper-legible business management tool that drives operational efficiency with calm authority.

spacing.rule: Use generous padding. Cards never flush to screen edge; maintain md or lg margins. Ensure touch targets are 44x44. Use space-between for grids.

do's: Use glass on bottom tab bar.
Use glass on sticky headers over scrolling content.
dont's: Do not use on generic list rows or cards.
Do not use on form inputs.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: A single-screen overview combining KPIs, quick actions, and active orders tracking for the current shift.

states.loading: Skeleton UI for KPI blocks and list rows.
states.empty: Should rarely be empty; if zero orders, show 'Belum ada pesanan hari ini' with empty basket illustration.
states.error: Error loading metrics card, with retry button.

screens.layout: Top Area: Store name, shift info, and notification icon. KPI Row: 2-column grid for 'Pendapatan Hari Ini' (Revenue) and 'Pesanan Baru' (New Orders). Quick Actions Row: 4 icon tiles (Buat Order, Pelanggan, Layanan, Laporan). Bottom List: 'Pesanan Berjalan' showing active laundry order cards with status badges.

screens.name: Order Management (Pesanan)
screens.purpose: Central hub to view and filter all laundry orders by their processing status.

states.empty: Illustration of empty basket + 'Tidak ada pesanan di status ini'.
states.error: Failed to load orders, pull to refresh.

screens.layout: Sticky header with glassmorphism over scroll. Segmented control/Tabs (Semua, Diterima, Cuci, Siap, Selesai). A vertical list of order cards. Each card displays Customer Name, Order ID, Service Type (Kiloan/Satuan), Price, and a status badge.

screens.name: New Order Form (Buat Order)
screens.purpose: Quick and efficient order intake process for cashiers with sticky bottom payment action.
screens.layout: Single scrollable column. Section 1: Customer Selection (Search/Add). Section 2: Service Type Picker (Kiloan/Satuan/Express). Section 3: Weight/Qty input with +/- steppers. Bottom: Fixed/Sticky CTA 'Proses Pembayaran' over a glass container.

screens.name: Order Detail & Payment
screens.purpose: Shows complete transaction details, printable receipt options, and Midtrans online payment link.
screens.layout: Timeline view for order status at the top. Bill breakdown card (Subtotal, Tax, Discount, Total). Bottom pinned area with two large buttons: 'Cetak Nota' (Print Receipt) and 'Bayar Online' (Midtrans integration button).

empty_basket.alt: Empty basket illustration for zero orders

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow '1 iOS-Native Clean' personality constraints. The user requested 'white and blue background' (putih biru), so the brand primary color is set to a crisp, trustworthy blue (#2563EB) against a clean white canvas.
Implement the 'Buat Order' (New Order) action prominently. It should be easily accessible from the Dashboard via a large Quick Action tile or a central FAB in the bottom bar.
Apply clear status color coding on Order Badges: Blue for Diterima, Yellow/Orange for Sedang Dicuci (Washing), Green for Selesai/Siap (Ready). Use the defined 'status' token colors.
For the New Order form, use a sticky CTA 'Proses Pembayaran' anchored to the bottom inside a KeyboardAvoidingView with safe-area clearance.
Ensure all lists have generous spacing. Order cards should not touch screen edges (use lg margins).
Typography: Use Plus Jakarta Sans. Do not exceed font weight 500. Use sizing for hierarchy, not extreme weights.
Never use raw hex colors in components. Always map to the theme tokens provided.
